text:
**The big finding that reshapes the plan:** every single upstream prerequisite is already closed. Trellis #114 (serializable traces, via PR #141), #122 (typed keys), #125 (bounded audit retention), #126 (scope reclamation) — all done. And NMP #2808 (shadow → authority promotion) merged *today* via PR #2832. Two consequences:

1. **Chirp #30's v0 "Shadow X-Ray" is obsolete** — there's no shadow plan to visualize anymore. Skip straight to v1 authority receipts.
2. **Nothing blocks NMP #2809 except the ADR decision itself.** The remaining work is entirely NMP + Chirp; Trellis needs nothing new. [...] - **Phase D — Chirp X-Ray pane** (chirp#30 v1): dev-build-only declared projection/devtools channel; Chirp renders, never parses.
